nasb.text: Yet these you may eat among all the winged insects which walk on all fours: those which have above their feet jointed legs with which to jump on the earth.

esv.text: Yet among the winged insects that go on all fours you may eat those that have jointed legs above their feet, with which to hop on the ground.

cnv.text: 但在所有有翅膀、四足爬行的生物中，如果有足有腿，能在地上蹦跳的，你們都可以吃。

ccb.text: 但可以吃会飞会跳的昆虫，
